LR_DECAY_EPOCHS = [60, 80]","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"build_scheduler","new":"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):
    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:
        return None
    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 8
    return optim.lr_scheduler.OneCycleLR(
        optimizer,
        max_lr=LEARNING_RATE,
        total_steps=total_steps,
        pct_start=0.15,
        anneal_strategy="cos",
        div_factor=10.0,
        final_div_factor=100.0,
        three_phase=False,
    )","old":"","op":"replace_function","source":"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):
    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:
        return None
    total_steps = steps_per_epoch * 100
    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Widen the flat MLP to a stable 4x512 stack and switch the short fixed-step run to AdamW plus OneCycleLR, which is a better fit than the current small Adam setup for raw-pixel CIFAR-10.","secondary_modes":["indexing","summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"build_scheduler","new":"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):

    return optim.lr_scheduler.OneCycleLR(

        total_steps=total_steps,
        pct_start=0.15,
        anneal_strategy="cos",

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"build_scheduler","new":"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):
    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:
        return None
    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 8
    return optim.lr_scheduler.OneCycleLR(
        optimizer,
        max_lr=LEARNING_RATE,
        total_steps=total_steps,
        pct_start=0.2,
        anneal_strategy="cos",
        div_factor=10.0,
        final_div_factor=100.0,
        three_phase=False,
    )","old":"","op":"replace_function","source":"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):

        total_steps=total_steps,
        pct_start=0.2,
        anneal_strategy="cos",

    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"Apply the scheduler change directly with exact replacement so the run actually uses a fixed-step OneCycle policy instead of the stale long cosine schedule; that remains the strongest remaining lever on this baseline MLP.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The OneCycle schedule is now helping, but the peak rate still looks slightly hot relative to the best seen loss, so a small downward LR scale adjustment is the lowest-risk way to try to clear the remaining gap.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8.5e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The OneCycle setup was better than the old cosine, but dropping the peak LR from 8e-4 to 7e-4 was too conservative; nudge it back up slightly to recover the lost headroom while keeping the same stable schedule.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8.25e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8.5e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The current setting is near the best visible point, so a small downward nudge in the peak learning rate is the lowest-risk way to probe whether the OneCycle run is still slightly overcooking the early updates.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8.75e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8.25e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The sweep has shown this run is sensitive around the current peak LR, and the lower 8.25e-4 setting drifted upward, so move slightly above the known-good 8.5e-4 point to try to squeeze out the last bit of loss.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8.75e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The OneCycle sweep is still improving as the peak rate rises, so keep the same schedule and test a slightly hotter peak LR to try to shave off the last few thousandths of validation loss.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.25e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 9e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The current sweep is still improving as the peak LR rises, so take a smaller upward step to see whether the OneCycle peak is still below the optimum.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.5e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.25e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The sweep is still moving in the same direction, so keep the schedule fixed and raise the peak LR a bit more to test whether the current optimum is still above the true best point.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.75e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.5e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The sweep is still trending downward as the peak LR rises, so take one more small step up to see whether the current optimum is still ahead of the present setting.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.75e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The best visible result is still improving as the peak learning rate increases, so push one small step higher to test whether the OneCycle optimum is just above the current setting.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.85e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The optimum appears to sit just below 1e-3, so move a hair back down from the over-hot setting while staying close to the best-performing OneCycle peak.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.9e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.85e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The peak-LR sweep is still hovering just below 1e-3, so take one last tiny upward step to see if the optimum sits between the current value and 1e-3.","secondary_modes":["summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.85e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.9e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"        pct_start=0.15,","old":"        pct_start=0.2,","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"The best peak LR was a hair below the current value, and the OneCycle ramp may still be too long for a 256-step run, so restore the stronger peak while spending a bit more of the budget at useful learning rates.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"        pct_start=0.1,","old":"        pct_start=0.15,","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"The strongest gain came from shortening the OneCycle ramp, so trim it a bit further to spend more of the 256 steps in the useful learning-rate region.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"        pct_start=0.15,","old":"        pct_start=0.1,","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"The 10% warmup regressed; the 15% ramp was the best observed OneCycle shape, so restore it to recover the strongest validated configuration for the final step.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}
